entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 43
entries.excerpt: When their bread was used up and all the household began to suffer hunger, all the sons approached Jacob with the words: “Have pity on Simeon for the sake of Simeon’s children, and consent for several days not to see thy youngest son for the sake of Simeon’s wife, who is now without husband.” Since Jacob himself too endured hunger, he reluctantly let Benjamin go with them, and sent them off with blessings: “As I have been bereaved of Rachel, so I am bereaved also of Rachel’s sons.…
